member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FeatureFlags.FeatureFlagExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering feature flag services and middleware.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FeatureFlags.FeatureFlagExtensions.WithFeatureFlags(AspNetCore.Multitenancy.MultitenancyBuilder,System.Action{AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FeatureFlags.PlanFeatureOptions})
member.summary: Registers the per-tenant feature flag services.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FeatureFlags.FeatureFlagExtensions.UseTenantFeatures(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds the to the ASP.NET Core pipeline. Place this after UseRouting() and UseMultitenancy().

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FeatureFlags.ITenantFeatureService
member.summary: Checks whether a named feature is enabled for the current tenant. Features are gated by the tenant's subscription plan.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FeatureFlags.ITenantFeatureService.IsEnabled(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the named feature is enabled for the current tenant's plan.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FeatureFlags.ITenantFeatureService.GetEnabledFeatures
member.summary: Returns all features enabled for the current tenant's plan.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FeatureFlags.RequireFeatureAttribute
member.summary: Marks a controller or action as requiring a specific tenant feature. If the feature is disabled for the current tenant's plan, the middleware returns HTTP 404 (not 403) so that other tenants cannot enumerate which features exist.

member.name: P:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FeatureFlags.RequireFeatureAttribute.FeatureName
member.summary: Gets the feature name required to access the decorated endpoint.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FeatureFlags.TenantFeatureMiddleware
member.summary:
Middleware that checks on the matched endpoint and returns HTTP 404 if the feature is disabled for the current tenant's plan.
Returns 404 (not 403) deliberately — so tenants cannot enumerate which features exist on other plans.

member.name: T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FeatureFlags.TenantPlanFeatureProvider
T:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FeatureFlags.PlanFeatureOptions
member.summary: Configuration object that maps plan names to feature sets.

member.name: M:AspNetCore.Multitenancy.FeatureFlags.PlanFeatureOptions.AddPlan(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Registers the features available for a subscription plan.
